name: North Harbour Coastal Mist Eau De Parfum 50ml
general_info: A fresh aquatic-citrus fragrance for women with bergamot, sea breeze accord, soft jasmine, and clean musk. Best suited to shoppers wanting something airy, crisp, and not too sweet.
directions: Spray 1 to 2 times onto pulse points such as wrists and neck. Reapply lightly if needed. Avoid eyes and broken skin.
ingredients: Alcohol denat., fragrance, aqua, limonene, linalool, citronellol, hexyl cinnamal

name: Southern Bloom Velvet Petal Eau De Parfum 50ml
general_info: A floral feminine scent built around rose, peony, freesia, and soft powdery musk. Best for shoppers asking for a classic floral perfume.
directions: Spray lightly onto neck and wrists from 10 to 15 cm away. Do not rub directly after spraying.
ingredients: Alcohol denat., fragrance, aqua, geraniol, citronellol, linalool, benzyl salicylate

name: Pure Horizon Vanilla Veil Eau De Parfum 50ml
general_info: A warm vanilla-amber fragrance with creamy tonka, soft caramel, and a smooth skin-scent finish. Best for shoppers wanting something sweet, comforting, and easy to wear.
directions: Apply 1 to 2 sprays to pulse points. Suitable for day or evening use. Avoid contact with eyes.
ingredients: Alcohol denat., fragrance, aqua, coumarin, vanillin, benzyl benzoate, limonene

name: BlueWattle Citrus Bloom Eau De Parfum 50ml
general_info: A sparkling citrus-floral perfume with mandarin, neroli, orange blossom, and light white musk. Good for shoppers wanting a bright daytime scent.
directions: Mist lightly onto wrists, collarbone, or clothing from a short distance. Avoid delicate fabrics and eyes.
ingredients: Alcohol denat., fragrance, aqua, limonene, linalool, citral, benzyl alcohol

name: BlueWattle Ember Cedar Cologne 100ml
general_info: A spicy woody men's cologne with cedar, clove, dry amber, and a smoky finish. Best for shoppers wanting something warm, masculine, and evening-friendly.
directions: Apply 1 to 3 sprays to neck and wrists. For stronger wear, spray once onto chest over dry skin.
ingredients: Alcohol denat., fragrance, aqua, coumarin, cinnamal, limonene, linalool

name: North Harbour Drift Lime Cologne 100ml
general_info: A clean fresh men's cologne with lime zest, green mandarin, marine notes, and pale woods. Best for shoppers asking for something sporty, citrusy, and light.
directions: Spray 2 times onto pulse points after showering. Reapply once later in the day if desired.
ingredients: Alcohol denat., fragrance, aqua, limonene, citral, linalool, hexyl cinnamal

name: Pure Horizon Black Pepper Vetiver Eau De Parfum 100ml
general_info: A deep spicy-earthy fragrance with black pepper, vetiver, patchouli, and dark woods. Best for shoppers wanting something bold, mature, and more intense than a fresh cologne.
directions: Use 1 to 2 sprays only due to stronger concentration. Apply to neck or wrists and avoid over-spraying in enclosed spaces.
ingredients: Alcohol denat., fragrance, aqua, limonene, eugenol, linalool, coumarin

name: VitalRoot Sandal Smoke Cologne 100ml
general_info: A dry woody men's scent with sandalwood, incense, cardamom, and soft leather. Best for shoppers wanting an earthy or smoky fragrance rather than something sweet or citrus-led.
directions: Spray lightly onto pulse points. Start with 1 spray and build only if needed.
ingredients: Alcohol denat., fragrance, aqua, cinnamal, eugenol, limonene, benzyl benzoate

name: VitalRoot Women's Daily Multi Gummies 60 Pack
general_info: Daily women's multivitamin gummies to support general wellness, energy metabolism, hair, skin, and immune health. A good pick for shoppers wanting an easy-to-take everyday multi.
directions: Adults: chew 2 gummies daily with food. Do not swallow whole.
ingredients: Vitamin C, Vitamin D3, Biotin, Folate, Vitamin B12, Zinc, natural berry flavours
warnings: Do not exceed the recommended daily dose. Vitamins and minerals should not replace a balanced diet. Contains sugars. Keep out of reach of children.

name: Pure Horizon Magnesium Restore 120 Tablets
general_info: A daily magnesium tablet for muscle function, nervous system support, and general recovery. Suitable for shoppers asking for magnesium for cramps, tension, or everyday replenishment.
directions: Adults: take 1 tablet daily with water after a meal. For higher needs, take 2 tablets daily or as professionally advised.
ingredients: Magnesium citrate, magnesium oxide, vitamin B6, microcrystalline cellulose, magnesium stearate
warnings: If symptoms persist, talk to your health professional. Contains magnesium which may have a laxative effect in some people. Keep out of reach of children.

name: BlueWattle Immunity Plus Vitamin C + Zinc Powder 150g
general_info: A once-daily powder for immune support with vitamin C, zinc, acerola, and citrus bioflavonoids. Best for shoppers asking for something specifically for immunity.
directions: Adults: mix half a scoop (approximately 2.5 g) into 200 mL of cold water once daily. Stir well and drink immediately.
ingredients: Vitamin C, zinc citrate, acerola extract, citrus bioflavonoids, natural orange flavour, stevia
warnings: Contains zinc; may cause nausea if taken on an empty stomach. High vitamin C intake may not be suitable for people prone to kidney stones. Do not exceed the recommended dose.

name: North Harbour Triple Strength Fish Oil 150 Capsules
general_info: High-strength omega-3 fish oil for heart, brain, and general wellness support. A strong fit for shoppers asking for fish oil or daily omega-3 support.
directions: Adults: take 3 capsules daily with food, or 1 capsule three times a day with meals.
ingredients: Concentrated fish oil providing omega-3 triglycerides, EPA, DHA, gelatin capsule, glycerol
warnings: Contains fish. If you are taking blood-thinning medication or have surgery planned, seek medical advice before use. Store below 25 C.

name: Southern Bloom Joint Flex Glucosamine + Turmeric 90 Tablets
general_info: Joint support formula with glucosamine, turmeric, and manganese. Best for shoppers asking what is good for joints, stiffness, or everyday mobility support.
directions: Adults: take 2 tablets daily with meals, or 1 tablet twice daily.
ingredients: Glucosamine sulfate, turmeric extract, manganese, cellulose, magnesium stearate
warnings: Contains glucosamine derived from shellfish. If you are pregnant, breastfeeding, or taking anticoagulants, seek professional advice before use.

name: Pure Horizon Sleep Quiet Magnesium + Ashwagandha Powder 200g
general_info: A calming evening powder with magnesium glycinate, ashwagandha, and L-theanine. Best for shoppers asking for sleep support or something to help wind down at night.
directions: Adults: mix 1 level scoop into warm water 30 to 60 minutes before bed. Do not combine with alcohol.
ingredients: Magnesium glycinate, ashwagandha extract, L-theanine, natural vanilla flavour, monk fruit
warnings: Not suitable for children. If you are pregnant, breastfeeding, taking sedatives, or managing a thyroid condition, seek professional advice before use.

name: VitalRoot Probiotic Balance 30 Billion 30 Capsules
general_info: A daily probiotic with multiple strains to support gut balance and digestive wellbeing. Best for shoppers asking for probiotics or gut health support.
directions: Adults: take 1 capsule daily with water, preferably before food. Refrigeration is not required for normal room-temperature storage.
ingredients: Lactobacillus acidophilus, Bifidobacterium lactis, Lactobacillus rhamnosus, vegetable capsule
warnings: If you are immunocompromised or seriously unwell, seek medical advice before use. Do not use if seal is broken.

name: North Harbour Gentle Iron + Folate 30 Capsules
general_info: A gentle iron formula with folate and vitamin C for women wanting daily iron support with less stomach upset than harsher iron products.
directions: Adults: take 1 capsule daily with water. Best taken with food if you have a sensitive stomach.
ingredients: Iron bisglycinate, folic acid, vitamin C, hypromellose capsule, rice flour
warnings: Contains iron which can be dangerous to children if taken in large amounts. Keep out of reach of children. Constipation may occur in some individuals.

name: Southern Bloom Marine Collagen Glow Powder 210g
general_info: Marine collagen powder for skin, hair, and nail support with added vitamin C. Best for shoppers asking for collagen or beauty-from-within support.
directions: Adults: mix 1 scoop into water, smoothies, or yoghurt once daily. Stir until fully dissolved.
ingredients: Marine collagen peptides, vitamin C, silica, natural berry flavour, beet juice powder
warnings: Contains fish. Not a sole source of nutrition. If pregnant or breastfeeding, seek professional advice before use.

name: BlueWattle Vitamin D3 1000 IU 300 Capsules
general_info: A simple daily vitamin D3 soft capsule for bone, muscle, and immune support. Best for shoppers asking for vitamin D or basic everyday bone support.
directions: Adults: take 1 capsule daily with a meal containing fat, or as professionally advised.
ingredients: Colecalciferol (vitamin D3), soybean oil, gelatin, glycerol
warnings: Contains soy. Vitamin supplements should not replace a balanced diet. Do not exceed the recommended daily dose unless advised.

name: VitalRoot Stress Ease Ashwagandha 60 Capsules
general_info: A daily ashwagandha supplement designed for stress support and calmer day-to-day resilience. Best for shoppers asking for stress or adaptogen support rather than sleep-only support.
directions: Adults: take 1 capsule once or twice daily after food.
ingredients: Ashwagandha root extract, magnesium stearate, hypromellose capsule, rice flour
warnings: Not recommended during pregnancy unless advised by a health professional. Seek advice if taking thyroid medication, sedatives, or antidepressants.

name: Pure Horizon Kids Daily Immune Gummies 60 Pack
general_info: A kids' daily gummy with vitamin C, vitamin D, and zinc for general immune support. Best for shoppers asking for an immunity option suitable for children.
directions: Children 4 years and over: chew 1 gummy daily under adult supervision.
ingredients: Vitamin C, vitamin D3, zinc, pectin, natural fruit flavours, colour from fruit concentrates
warnings: Contains sugars. Not suitable for children under 4 years unless professionally advised. Store out of reach of young children.
